requirement: Phase 0.7: platform-service, tenant registry CRUD, provisioning workflow, platform-admin UI

tasks.title: Platform-service scaffold + tenant registry CRUD
tasks.description:
Create the platform-service Go microservice and implement tenant registry CRUD.

Follow the securities-service pattern (src/securities-service/) for structure.

Scaffold:
- src/platform-service/go.mod (github.com/garudax-platform/platform-service, go 1.25.0)
- src/platform-service/cmd/platform-service/main.go — HTTP on port 8090, health on 9090
- src/platform-service/Dockerfile
- src/platform-service/internal/types/types.go — Tenant struct matching platform.tenants columns: ID, Name, Status (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/ONBOARDING/DECOMMISSIONED), Flagship bool, GovernanceTier, OnboardingMetadata map[string]interface{}, CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — all json tags
- src/platform-service/internal/store/store.go — TenantStore interface: List() []Tenant, Get(id) (*Tenant, error), Create(*Tenant) error, Update(id, partial) error, UpdateStatus(id, status) error. InMemoryTenantStore seeded with ace-commodities (ACTIVE) and mse-equities (ONBOARDING, flagship=true)
- src/platform-service/internal/server/server.go — health endpoints, route registration

Handlers (in server/handlers.go):
- GET /platform/v1/tenants — list all tenants
- GET /platform/v1/tenants/{id} — get by ID, 404 if not found
- POST /platform/v1/tenants — create tenant (validate: id slug format, name required, status defaults to ONBOARDING)
- PATCH /platform/v1/tenants/{id} — update name, governance_tier
- PUT /platform/v1/tenants/{id}/status — change status (activate/suspend/decommission)

Note: This is the PLATFORM admin API — separate from tenant APIs at /api/v1/*. No tenant middleware needed (this IS the platform).

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/platform-service && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Tenant provisioning workflow + docker-compose + gateway
tasks.description:
Add tenant provisioning logic and wire platform-service into the stack.

Part A — Provisioning workflow in src/platform-service/internal/provisioning/provisioner.go:
- Provisioner struct with db *sql.DB (nullable for in-memory mode)
- ProvisionTenant(tenant *Tenant) (*ProvisionResult, error):
  1. Create tenant DB schemas: {tenant_id}_reference, {tenant_id}_exchange, etc. (8 schemas)
  2. Log Kafka topic prefixes to create: {tenant_id}.trades.*, {tenant_id}.clearing.*, etc.
  3. Create config entry in a tenant config store
  4. Return ProvisionResult{SchemasCreated []string, TopicPrefixes []string, Status string}
- For MVP: schemas are CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS via SQL. If no DB, return a dry-run result listing what WOULD be created.
- DeprovisionTenant(tenantID string) error — marks schemas for cleanup (does not DROP)

Part B — Wire into create tenant handler:
- After creating tenant in store, call provisioner.ProvisionTenant
- Return provisioning result alongside tenant in response

Part C — Add to docker-compose.yml:
- platform-service: build src/platform-service, ports 8090:8090 9090:9090, healthcheck, depends_on postgres, garudax-network

Part D — Add gateway proxy for platform API:
- In src/gateway/cmd/gateway/main.go: add platform-service to backend client map (port 8090)
- Add route: /platform/v1/* → platform-service (skip tenant middleware for platform routes)
- In gateway config: add PlatformServiceAddr env var

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/platform-service && go build ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md

tasks.title: Platform admin page in admin-ui
tasks.description:
Add a Platform Admin page to the admin dashboard for tenant management.

Part A — API functions in src/admin-ui/src/services/api.ts:
- fetchTenants(signal?) — GET /platform/v1/tenants
- createTenant(data) — POST /platform/v1/tenants
- updateTenantStatus(id, status) — PUT /platform/v1/tenants/{id}/status

Part B — Sidebar + routes:
- Add 'Platform' entry to sidebar (use ShieldIcon, path: /dashboard/platform, adminOnly: true)
- Add Route in App.tsx

Part C — Platform page at src/admin-ui/src/pages/PlatformAdmin.tsx:
- Title: 'Platform — Tenant Management'
- DataGrid with columns: id (mono), name, status (StatusBadge), flagship (boolean badge), governance_tier, created_at
- Actions: Activate/Suspend button based on current status
- 'Create Tenant' button → modal with fields: id (slug, required), name (required), governance_tier (select: STANDARD/FLAGSHIP/SANDBOX)
- usePolling every 30s, loading={isLoading}, toast on create/status change
- Export validateTenantForm as pure function

CSS module: src/admin-ui/src/pages/PlatformAdmin.module.css

CX ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA (all must pass):
□ Loading state: shows skeleton/spinner while data loads
□ Empty state: meaningful message when no data exists
□ Error state: user-friendly error with retry
□ Responsive: works on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1280px+)
□ Keyboard navigation: all interactive elements reachable via Tab
□ Accessible: proper ARIA labels, semantic HTML
□ Toast/feedback: user actions produce visible confirmation
□ Form validation: inline errors shown on blur, submit disabled until valid
□ No raw technical errors visible to user
□ Consistent styling: uses project design tokens/theme

Run: cd src/admin-ui && npx tsc --noEmit && npm test -- --run

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T3.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for platform-service
tasks.description:
Write unit tests for the platform-service.

Read .softhouse/handoff/T1.md and T2.md for what was implemented.

Create tests:

1. src/platform-service/internal/store/store_test.go:
- TestTenantStore_List — verify seeded tenants (ace-commodities, mse-equities)
- TestTenantStore_Get — existing and non-existent
- TestTenantStore_Create — valid tenant, duplicate ID error
- TestTenantStore_Update — partial update, non-existent error
- TestTenantStore_UpdateStatus — valid transitions, invalid status

2. src/platform-service/internal/server/handlers_test.go:
- TestListTenants — GET returns seeded tenants
- TestGetTenant_Found — GET existing → 200
- TestGetTenant_NotFound → 404
- TestCreateTenant_Success — POST valid → 201
- TestCreateTenant_MissingName → 422
- TestCreateTenant_DuplicateID → 409
- TestUpdateTenantStatus — PUT /status activate → 200
- TestCreateTenant_InvalidSlug — special chars → 422

3. src/platform-service/internal/provisioning/provisioner_test.go:
- TestProvisionTenant_DryRun — no DB → returns expected schema/topic lists
- TestDeprovisionTenant — verify decommission status

Target: 70%+ coverage.

IMPORTANT: Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. Run: export PATH=$PATH:/usr/local/go/bin && cd src/platform-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T4.md
